topic: Build an App With No Code Using Claude Code

caption.hook: Build a working app without writing a single line of code.
caption.summary: Claude Code is an AI that lives in your terminal. You describe the app in plain English and it writes, runs, and fixes the code for you. Here's the exact 4-step flow.
caption.content:
• Install Claude Code with one command
• Open it inside an empty project folder
• Describe the app you want in plain English
• Tell it to run the app and fix any errors
caption.cta: Save this + follow @genzcapital for daily AI tools & how-tos. No fluff. No hype.

slides.headline: Create an app in 4 steps
slides.subheadline: BUILD A FUNCTIONAL APP WITHOUT CODING

slides.headline: Install Claude Code
slides.body: Open your terminal and run: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code. One command, no setup.

slides.headline: Open it in your folder
slides.body: Make an empty folder for your app, then type 'claude' inside it. The AI now works in that folder.
slides.ref_query: code editor project folder dark theme

slides.headline: Describe your app
slides.body: Type what you want in plain English: 'Build a to-do list web app.' It writes every file for you.

slides.headline: Run it and fix bugs
slides.body: Say 'run the app.' If anything breaks, say 'fix the error' and it patches the code itself.

slides.headline: Be specific to get more
slides.body: Add details like colors, pages, and features in your request. The clearer the ask, the better the app.

slides.headline: What you just learned
points: Open it in an empty folder
Describe the app in plain English
Run it and let it fix its own bugs

slides.headline: I find these so you don't have to
pills: ONE USABLE AI SKILL A DAY
